title: Toasted Spinach Delight
description: A Japanese-inspired spinach dish with a crispy toasted twist. Enjoy as a side or light meal.
instructions: 2. Wash the spinach and delicata squash, then chop into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped delicata squash and cook for 3-4 minutes.
5. Add the spinach to the pan and cook until wilted.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
7. Pour the sauce over the spinach and delicata squash mixture.
8. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with toasted sesame seeds.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the sesame seeds are golden brown.
